title: Lead SEO Specialist at Porter Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Porter Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Porter Advisory Limited family as a SEO Specialist in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Porter Advisory Limited:
Porter Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter Advisory Limited!
